title: TurnAttributionLogEntry
description: Per-allocation attribution log emitted by the TURN relay to stdout-JSON. Authoritative shape for both Cloudflare Calls (provider dashboard export) and self-hosted coturn (log rewriter sidecar). PII-scrubbed: peer addresses are bucketed to /24 IPv4 / /64 IPv6; credential `username` and `credential` fields are NEVER written. Cross-link: docs/architecture/turn-credentials.md § 8, services/turn/README.md.

ts.description: Wall-clock at the event, milliseconds since epoch.

roomCode.description: Recovered from the credential `username` (`<exp>:<roomCode>:<peerId>`). The TURN server does not consult any database; the room scope is self-describing in the credential.

allocId.description: TURN-server-local allocation identifier; not exposed to clients.

peerAddrBucket.description: /24 IPv4 or /64 IPv6 prefix. Full peer address is NEVER logged.

reason.description: Closed reason code for non-`alloc.created` events.
